remarks: ENDORSEMENT SCHEDULE: (1) CA 04 44 10 13 – Waiver of Transfer of Rights of Recovery Against Others to Us; (2) CG 21 39 10 93 – Contractual Liability Limitation; (3) IL 09 35 01 15 – Exclusion of Certified Acts of Terrorism; (4) WC 00 03 01A – Alternate Employer Endorsement; (5) CG 20 26 04 13 – Additional Insured - Designated Person or Organization; (6) IM 99 01 09 09 – Inland Marine Equipment Floater. ADDITIONAL INSURED: Navigator Realty Management Inc. is an Additional Insured under the General Liability and Umbrella policies as required by the underlying contract. SPECIAL CONDITIONS: Primary and Non-Contributory wording applies per policy endorsement. Waiver of Subrogation applies in favor of the certificate holder as required by written contract. Per Project Aggregate Limit applies as indicated on the endorsement schedule. LOCATION DESCRIPTIONS: LOC-001: Rickenbacker Logistics Center - A – 6500 Alum Creek Drive, Columbus, OH 43217 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-002: Rickenbacker Logistics Center - B – 6600 Alum Creek Drive, Columbus, OH 43217 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-003: Cleveland Distribution Hub – 4800 Tiedeman Road, Brooklyn, OH 44144 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-004: Dayton Manufacturing Facility – 2100 Kuntz Road, Dayton, OH 45404 (Occupancy: Manufacturing). SUBCONTRACTOR REQUIREMENTS: All subcontractors must maintain Commercial General Liability with limits not less than $1,000,000 per occurrence and $2,000,000 general aggregate. NATURE OF OPERATIONS: The insured's principal operations consist of industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. Entity type: LLC.
